Document 41
Date 18 July 2026
Time 14:23
Title Infringement - Free Practice 3 Deleted Lap Times

2026 BELGIAN GRAND PRIX 
17 – 19 July 2026 
 
  
  
From The Stewards      Document 41 
  
To All Officials, All Teams      Date  18 July 2026 
 
        T i m e   14:22 
  
 
The Stewards, having received a report from the Race Director, have considered the following matter and determine the 
following: 
 
Session Free Practice 3 
  
Fact The F1 cars below did not use the track at turns 4,6, 9 and 19.
